products.shortDescription: The perfect balance of attraction and nutrition, Buck Chow is a complete, 20% high protein deer feed, featuring GB Feed’s Real Results Protein Pellets and antler growing minerals combined with all natural grains and roasted soybeans to deliver year round attraction and nutrition for better herd health and maximum antler growth.
products.descriptionFormatted:
“Extra Inches Aren’t An Accident”
The perfect balance of attraction and nutrition, Buck Chow is a complete, 20% high protein deer feed, featuring GB Feed’s Real Results Protein Pellets and antler growing minerals combined with all natural grains and roasted soybeans to deliver year round attraction and nutrition for better herd health and maximum antler growth.
- Tested and proven right here in the Midwest
- Designed to be fed year-round from early spring all the way through shed season
- Includes minerals such as Calcium and Phosphorus for optimal herd health and antler growth
- Long Range Aroma To Attract Deer
- Can be used in gravity feeders, spin feeders or ground piles
- Over 7,500 inches of proven results and counting!

images.alt: Buck Chow 40lb bag in a Kansas field
Buck Chow 40lb bag close-up showing label
Deer feeding on Buck Chow in a field

products.shortDescription: Designed to enhance the Aroma, Flavor and Nutrition of your whole corn, Corn Candy is the secret weapon to help deer find your feed site quicker and come back more often. Corn Candy can be added into your feeder with your whole corn or over the top of a ground pile feed site to increase the attractiveness and give you the edge over other hunters in your area.
products.descriptionFormatted:
“Turn Your Corn Into Deer Candy”
Designed to enhance the Aroma, Flavor and Nutrition of your whole corn, Corn Candy is the secret weapon to help deer find your feed site quicker and come back more often. Corn Candy can be added into your feeder with your whole corn or over the top of a ground pile feed site to increase the attractiveness and give you the edge over other hunters in your area.
- Each 7lb bag treats approximately 500lbs of corn
- Helps deer find your feed 5X faster than regular corn
- Economical way to enhance your deer feed
- Allows you to pull deer from longer ranges

images.alt: Corn Candy 7lb bag
Corn Candy poured over corn in a feeder

products.shortDescription: Tactacam's REVEAL X 2.0 combines long-lasting power performance with remarkable image quality, day or night. X 2.0 comes with the low-glow IR advantage, delivering the fastest shutter trigger, longest range detection, and clearest image captures with minimal to no motion blur, even at night! Weather-resistant body, instant photo delivery, and simple operation make this a must-have cellular camera for all remote or outdoor observation.

products.shortDescription: Tactacam's REVEAL X-PRO is a powerhouse for discreet cellular image capture. products.shortDescription: Tactacam's REVEAL Adjustable Camera Stake is a secure telescopic mounting stick for ground installation of your REVEAL cellular camera. Its steel body provides secure footing with 20"-54" camera height adjustment. Both the center spike and detachable side arm are rotatable, offering enhanced adjustability. Easy setup; no tools required.
